nasb.text: So putting out to sea from Troas, we ran a straight course to Samothrace, and on the day following to Neapolis;

esv.text: So, setting sail from Troas, we made a direct voyage to Samothrace, and the following day to Neapolis,

cnv.text: 我們從特羅亞開船，直航撒摩特拉，第二天到達尼亞波利，

ccb.text: 我们从特罗亚启航，直接驶往撒摩特喇，第二天抵达尼亚坡里，

csbs.text: 我们从特罗阿斯港开船直航，到萨莫特拉岛，第二天到了奈阿波利斯港，
